ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot expressing pride and inclusivity using a rainbow flag. The robot will hold the flag aloft for a moment, then gently lower it. This will be a slow, deliberate motion, emphasizing the care and respect the robot feels. The robot's arms don't have elbows, so the movements must be slightly stylized to convey the intent effectively. Frame 1 shows both arms raised, holding an (imaginary) rainbow flag high. Frame 2 shows a slight lowering of the flag, emphasizing the gesture's care. Frame 3 shows the robot holding the flag at chest level. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to the robot's sides in a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms raise an imaginary flag high in pride
gently lowering the banner with care and respect
holding the flag at chest level, a moment of reflection
arms return to rest, pride expressed with dignity
